qa_pairs.question: If I already have an Alliance account but my position or sponsor has changed, what should I do?
qa_pairs.answer: If your position or sponsor has changed and you have an existing Alliance account, you should apply for a new role (which will have a new CCRI) instead of signing up for a new account. To do this, log in with your existing account and visit the "apply for a new role" form on the CCDB portal.

qa_pairs.question: What is the process if I forget my password for my Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: If you have forgotten your password for your Alliance account, you can reset it by visiting the password reset page on the CCDB portal.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I can no longer access the email address associated with my Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: If you can no longer access the email address you have on file for your Alliance account, you should email accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca to have it updated.
